test-case.description: exports exactly the expected public functions
test-case.name: FinOpsAssess module surface.exports exactly the expected public functions

test-case.description: declares PowerShell 7.2+ as the minimum supported version
test-case.name: FinOpsAssess module surface.declares PowerShell 7.2+ as the minimum supported version

test-case.description: reports a module version that matches the manifest
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsInfo.reports a module version that matches the manifest

test-case.description: advertises a read-only posture with the scope guard available but not yet enforced
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsInfo.advertises a read-only posture with the scope guard available but not yet enforced

test-case.description: reports structured scope-guard coverage including the honest ARM limitation
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsInfo.reports structured scope-guard coverage including the honest ARM limitation

test-case.description: lists the four in-scope surfaces
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsInfo.lists the four in-scope surfaces

test-suite.name: Version lock between the PowerShell module and the Python package
test-suite.description: Version lock between the PowerShell module and the Python package

test-case.description: manifest ModuleVersion equals the Python __version__
test-case.name: Version lock between the PowerShell module and the Python package.manifest ModuleVersion equals the Python __version__

test-case.description: returns a successful structured result inside the repo tree
test-case.name: Test-FinOpsConfiguration.returns a successful structured result inside the repo tree

test-suite.name: Read-only tripwire: no mutation-shaped code in the module
test-suite.description: Read-only tripwire: no mutation-shaped code in the module

test-case.description: contains no forbidden patterns in module source
test-case.name: Read-only tripwire: no mutation-shaped code in the module.contains no forbidden patterns in module source

test-case.description: counter-tripwire: the ONLY file carrying the .ReadWrite. literal is the policy file
test-case.name: Read-only tripwire: no mutation-shaped code in the module.counter-tripwire: the ONLY file carrying the .ReadWrite. literal is the policy file

test-suite.name: Read-only scope guard: write/admin scopes are refused
test-suite.description: Read-only scope guard: write/admin scopes are refused

test-case.description: refuses a Graph delegated write scope (scp)
test-case.name: Read-only scope guard: write/admin scopes are refused.refuses a Graph delegated write scope (scp)

test-case.description: refuses a Graph application write role (roles)
test-case.name: Read-only scope guard: write/admin scopes are refused.refuses a Graph application write role (roles)

test-case.description: refuses a mixed read+write token (write wins)
test-case.name: Read-only scope guard: write/admin scopes are refused.refuses a mixed read+write token (write wins)

test-case.description: refuses .AccessAsUser.All (write capability without the word Write)
test-case.name: Read-only scope guard: write/admin scopes are refused.refuses .AccessAsUser.All (write capability without the word Write)

test-case.description: refuses Mail.Send (mutation that does not say Write)
test-case.name: Read-only scope guard: write/admin scopes are refused.refuses Mail.Send (mutation that does not say Write)

test-case.description: refuses full_access_as_app (Exchange full mailbox)
test-case.name: Read-only scope guard: write/admin scopes are refused.refuses full_access_as_app (Exchange full mailbox)

test-case.description: refuses an Azure DevOps write scope
test-case.name: Read-only scope guard: write/admin scopes are refused.refuses an Azure DevOps write scope

test-case.description: refuses GitHub classic write/admin scopes
test-case.name: Read-only scope guard: write/admin scopes are refused.refuses GitHub classic write/admin scopes

test-case.description: refuses GitHub public_repo (read/write on public repos)
test-case.name: Read-only scope guard: write/admin scopes are refused.refuses GitHub public_repo (read/write on public repos)

test-case.description: refuses GitHub repo:status (read/write on commit statuses)
test-case.name: Read-only scope guard: write/admin scopes are refused.refuses GitHub repo:status (read/write on commit statuses)

test-suite.name: Read-only scope guard: read-only credentials pass
test-suite.description: Read-only scope guard: read-only credentials pass

test-case.description: passes a Graph read-only delegated token
test-case.name: Read-only scope guard: read-only credentials pass.passes a Graph read-only delegated token

test-case.description: passes a Graph read-only application token
test-case.name: Read-only scope guard: read-only credentials pass.passes a Graph read-only application token

test-case.description: passes GitHub read-only scopes
test-case.name: Read-only scope guard: read-only credentials pass.passes GitHub read-only scopes

test-case.description: passes an Azure DevOps read scope
test-case.name: Read-only scope guard: read-only credentials pass.passes an Azure DevOps read scope

test-case.description: classifies the surface from the audience claim
test-case.name: Read-only scope guard: read-only credentials pass.classifies the surface from the audience claim

test-suite.name: Read-only scope guard: fail-closed on unknown / insufficient claims
test-suite.description: Read-only scope guard: fail-closed on unknown / insufficient claims

test-case.description: refuses an ARM token (read-only not provable from claims)
test-case.name: Read-only scope guard: fail-closed on unknown / insufficient claims.refuses an ARM token (read-only not provable from claims)

test-case.description: refuses an unrecognised scope by default (fail-closed)
test-case.name: Read-only scope guard: fail-closed on unknown / insufficient claims.refuses an unrecognised scope by default (fail-closed)

test-case.description: refuses an empty granted-scope list (e.g. fine-grained PAT)
test-case.name: Read-only scope guard: fail-closed on unknown / insufficient claims.refuses an empty granted-scope list (e.g. fine-grained PAT)

test-case.description: refuses a token-shaped string passed as a scope
test-case.name: Read-only scope guard: fail-closed on unknown / insufficient claims.refuses a token-shaped string passed as a scope

test-case.description: -AllowUnknownScopes downgrades unknown to a warning but still passes
test-case.name: Read-only scope guard: fail-closed on unknown / insufficient claims.-AllowUnknownScopes downgrades unknown to a warning but still passes

test-case.description: -AllowUnknownScopes does NOT rescue a write scope
test-case.name: Read-only scope guard: fail-closed on unknown / insufficient claims.-AllowUnknownScopes does NOT rescue a write scope

test-case.description: rejects a malformed (non-JWT) token
test-case.name: Read-only scope guard: fail-closed on unknown / insufficient claims.rejects a malformed (non-JWT) token

test-case.description: ships the three projection files alongside the module
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsDataProjection.ships the three projection files alongside the module

test-case.description: loads via the real module path and returns the three collections
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsDataProjection.loads via the real module path and returns the three collections

test-case.description: returns each collection as an array even via single-item assignment
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsDataProjection.returns each collection as an array even via single-item assignment

test-case.description: loads the expected number of catalogue, persona, and rule entries
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsDataProjection.loads the expected number of catalogue, persona, and rule entries

test-case.description: preserves entry shape including resolved defaults
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsDataProjection.preserves entry shape including resolved defaults

test-case.description: round-trips non-ASCII (UTF-8) text without corruption
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsDataProjection.round-trips non-ASCII (UTF-8) text without corruption

test-case.description: throws a clear error when a projection file is missing
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsDataProjection.throws a clear error when a projection file is missing

test-suite.name: Test-FinOpsConfiguration includes the data projection check
test-suite.description: Test-FinOpsConfiguration includes the data projection check

test-case.description: reports a passing data-projection check
test-case.name: Test-FinOpsConfiguration includes the data projection check.reports a passing data-projection check

test-case.description: produces every NormalizedDataset field
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsNormalizedDataset over the demo tenant.produces every NormalizedDataset field

test-case.description: reads the expected record counts
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsNormalizedDataset over the demo tenant.reads the expected record counts

test-case.description: emits non-CSV-backed fields as empty lists
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsNormalizedDataset over the demo tenant.emits non-CSV-backed fields as empty lists

test-case.description: coerces scalar types and nulls correctly
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsNormalizedDataset over the demo tenant.coerces scalar types and nulls correctly

test-case.description: reads overrides.yaml as a flat key/value map
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsNormalizedDataset over the demo tenant.reads overrides.yaml as a flat key/value map

test-suite.name: Layer-2 conformance: PowerShell normalised dataset matches the Python golden
test-suite.description: Layer-2 conformance: PowerShell normalised dataset matches the Python golden

test-case.description: ships the committed golden fixture
test-case.name: Layer-2 conformance: PowerShell normalised dataset matches the Python golden.ships the committed golden fixture

test-case.description: deep-equals the Python-generated normalised demo dataset
test-case.name: Layer-2 conformance: PowerShell normalised dataset matches the Python golden.deep-equals the Python-generated normalised demo dataset

test-case.description: rejects an unknown CSV column
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsNormalizedDataset strict-column contract.rejects an unknown CSV column

test-case.description: rejects a row with a non-empty cell beyond the header
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsNormalizedDataset strict-column contract.rejects a row with a non-empty cell beyond the header

test-case.description: rejects an unparseable boolean
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsNormalizedDataset strict-column contract.rejects an unparseable boolean

test-case.description: rejects a value outside the enum (literal)
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsNormalizedDataset strict-column contract.rejects a value outside the enum (literal)

test-case.description: rejects a mis-cased literal (pydantic Literal is case-sensitive)
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsNormalizedDataset strict-column contract.rejects a mis-cased literal (pydantic Literal is case-sensitive)

test-case.description: enforces numeric lower bounds (ge)
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsNormalizedDataset strict-column contract.enforces numeric lower bounds (ge)

test-case.description: rejects a missing required value
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsNormalizedDataset strict-column contract.rejects a missing required value

test-case.description: allows fewer cells than the header (treated as empty)
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsNormalizedDataset strict-column contract.allows fewer cells than the header (treated as empty)

test-case.description: rejects nested / non-flat YAML
test-case.name: Read-FinOpsOverrides mini-parser.rejects nested / non-flat YAML

test-suite.name: Get-FinOpsPersonaAssignment over the demo tenant (layer-2 conformance)
test-suite.description: Get-FinOpsPersonaAssignment over the demo tenant (layer-2 conformance)

test-case.description: ships the committed persona golden fixture
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsPersonaAssignment over the demo tenant (layer-2 conformance).ships the committed persona golden fixture

test-case.description: deep-equals the Python persona-assignment oracle
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsPersonaAssignment over the demo tenant (layer-2 conformance).deep-equals the Python persona-assignment oracle

test-case.description: exercises the override, title, and fallback signal paths
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsPersonaAssignment over the demo tenant (layer-2 conformance).exercises the override, title, and fallback signal paths

test-case.description: uses case-sensitive matching so a non-(?i) pattern does not over-match
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsPersonaAssignment regex + fallback parity.uses case-sensitive matching so a non-(?i) pattern does not over-match

test-case.description: honours an inline (?i) flag like Python does
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsPersonaAssignment regex + fallback parity.honours an inline (?i) flag like Python does

test-case.description: treats svc- prefixed principals as service accounts when no stronger signal exists
test-case.name: Get-FinOpsPersonaAssignment regex + fallback parity.treats svc- prefixed principals as service accounts when no stronger signal exists

test-case.description: renders the SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH=0 timestamp identically to Python
test-case.name: Build-FinOpsReport + report determinism.renders the SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH=0 timestamp identically to Python

test-case.description: falls back to wall-clock UTC for a malformed epoch (no throw)
test-case.name: Build-FinOpsReport + report determinism.falls back to wall-clock UTC for a malformed epoch (no throw)

test-case.description: redacts the input path to its leaf when redaction is on
test-case.name: Build-FinOpsReport + report determinism.redacts the input path to its leaf when redaction is on

test-case.description: records salt_mode=tenant_stable only when a salt is pinned
test-case.name: Build-FinOpsReport + report determinism.records salt_mode=tenant_stable only when a salt is pinned

test-case.description: marks summary.pii_redaction=disabled only when redaction is off
test-case.name: Build-FinOpsReport + report determinism.marks summary.pii_redaction=disabled only when redaction is off

test-suite.name: JSON report contract (layer-4 schema + layer-5 canonical equality)
test-suite.description: JSON report contract (layer-4 schema + layer-5 canonical equality)

test-case.description: emits LF-only newlines
test-case.name: JSON report contract (layer-4 schema + layer-5 canonical equality).emits LF-only newlines

test-case.description: validates against the shared report JSON schema (layer 4)
test-case.name: JSON report contract (layer-4 schema + layer-5 canonical equality).validates against the shared report JSON schema (layer 4)

test-case.description: canonical projection byte-equals the Python structural golden (layer 5)
test-case.name: JSON report contract (layer-4 schema + layer-5 canonical equality).canonical projection byte-equals the Python structural golden (layer 5)

test-case.description: reports no rules as skipped (M365, Azure, GitHub, ADO rules are all implemented)
test-case.name: JSON report contract (layer-4 schema + layer-5 canonical equality).reports no rules as skipped (M365, Azure, GitHub, ADO rules are all implemented)

test-case.description: ships both committed M365 goldens
test-case.name: M365 rule-slice conformance (layer-5 findings + CSV).ships both committed M365 goldens

test-case.description: canonical M365 projection byte-equals the Python findings golden
test-case.name: M365 rule-slice conformance (layer-5 findings + CSV).canonical M365 projection byte-equals the Python findings golden

test-case.description: flat CSV byte-equals the Python csv_reporter golden
test-case.name: M365 rule-slice conformance (layer-5 findings + CSV).flat CSV byte-equals the Python csv_reporter golden

test-case.description: ships both committed Azure goldens
test-case.name: Azure rule-slice conformance (layer-5 findings + CSV).ships both committed Azure goldens

test-case.description: canonical Azure projection byte-equals the Python findings golden
test-case.name: Azure rule-slice conformance (layer-5 findings + CSV).canonical Azure projection byte-equals the Python findings golden

test-case.description: flat CSV byte-equals the Python csv_reporter golden
test-case.name: Azure rule-slice conformance (layer-5 findings + CSV).flat CSV byte-equals the Python csv_reporter golden

test-case.description: Azure findings count matches expected
test-case.name: Azure rule-slice conformance (layer-5 findings + CSV).Azure findings count matches expected

test-case.description: Azure rules produce azure surface
test-case.name: Azure rule-slice conformance (layer-5 findings + CSV).Azure rules produce azure surface

test-case.description: renders known canonical JSON vectors
test-case.name: Triage canonical JSON helper parity.renders known canonical JSON vectors

test-case.description: matches Python _finding_ref on a representative finding
test-case.name: Triage canonical JSON helper parity.matches Python _finding_ref on a representative finding

test-case.description: ships triage golden fixtures
test-case.name: Triage conformance (json + csv byte-equal).ships triage golden fixtures

test-case.description: triage json bytes equal the Python golden
test-case.name: Triage conformance (json + csv byte-equal).triage json bytes equal the Python golden

test-case.description: triage csv bytes equal the Python golden
test-case.name: Triage conformance (json + csv byte-equal).triage csv bytes equal the Python golden

test-case.description: ships both committed GitHub goldens
test-case.name: GitHub rule-slice conformance (layer-5 findings + CSV).ships both committed GitHub goldens

test-case.description: canonical GitHub projection byte-equals the Python findings golden
test-case.name: GitHub rule-slice conformance (layer-5 findings + CSV).canonical GitHub projection byte-equals the Python findings golden

test-case.description: flat GitHub CSV byte-equals the Python csv_reporter golden
test-case.name: GitHub rule-slice conformance (layer-5 findings + CSV).flat GitHub CSV byte-equals the Python csv_reporter golden

test-case.description: report contains all four GitHub rule_counts
test-case.name: GitHub rule-slice conformance (layer-5 findings + CSV).report contains all four GitHub rule_counts

test-case.description: ships both committed ADO goldens
test-case.name: ADO rule-slice conformance (layer-5 findings + CSV).ships both committed ADO goldens

test-case.name: ADO rule-slice conformance (layer-5 findings + CSV).canonical ADO projection byte-equals the Python findings golden

test-case.name: ADO rule-slice conformance (layer-5 findings + CSV).flat ADO CSV byte-equals the Python csv_reporter golden

test-case.description: report contains all four ADO rule_counts
test-case.name: ADO rule-slice conformance (layer-5 findings + CSV).report contains all four ADO rule_counts
